input.input:
It's Monday morning. Identify the ONE thing that matters most this week. Surface the tradeoffs in choosing it over everything else on the table. Structure your output:

1. THE ONE THING — One sentence, no hedging
2. WHY THIS WEEK — What makes right now the right moment
3. WHAT WE'RE NOT DOING — The top 3 things we're explicitly deferring and why
4. THE TRADEOFF — The real cost of this focus
5. THE SIGNAL TO WATCH — One metric or signal that tells us if we're right
6. RISK — What could invalidate this by Friday

actions.name: e2e2e2e2-0002-0002-0002-000000000002
actions.displayName: Append Weekly Priorities to Company Context
